Bathroom plumbing

From repositioning wastes to installing showers and heated towel rails, we coordinate with your tiler or builder for a watertight finish.

  • Shower pumps and digital showers
  • Toilet and basin installations
  • Bath and wet-room wastes
  • Chrome pipework with pressure testing

Frequently asked questions

Can you work with my bathroom fitter?

Yes. We are used to staged projects and provide first-fix before boarding, then second-fix after tiling.

Do you handle waste disposal?

We remove plumbing packaging and old sanitaryware when agreed in advance. Skip hire remains with your main contractor unless quoted.

Get in touch

Contact us for a friendly chat about your requirements.
